name: ai-sre
description: Site Reliability Engineering tools for all Trigent products — EM, Training, PSW (AWS), VM, Volunteer, DismissalSafe, CPOMS (UK), SmartPass, SchoolPass Legacy (SchoolPass), Platform, Integrations. AI-assisted incident triage, blameless postmortems, SLO management, runbook authoring, and toil reduction.
